# OpinCode v0.0.5

This release introduces a fully-integrated inline pill editor, nested file and folder selection and attachment parsing, Z.AI and Moonshot AI (Kimi) provider support, improved settings configuration navigation, subagent delegation styling, and editor language enhancements.

## What is new

### Rich Input Bar and Inline Pills
- **Inline Pill Editor**: Replaced the plain textarea input and separate attachment chips row with a contenteditable-based rich input component. Context resources (files, folders, snippets, commands, and skills) now render as inline pills inline with the text.
- **Cursor Stability**: Fixed cursor snapping issues after inserting a pill. caret focus is now maintained stably at the end of the text/pill node.
- **Input Pill Delete Synchronization**: Deleting a pill inline via backspace now triggers immediate synchronization with the composer state to keep the active context in sync.
- **Trigger Characters**: Added full support for both slash (/) and dollar ($) character triggers to autocomplete skills.
- **Picker Design Matching**: Refactored the file picker autocomplete content to match the clean skills picker design, including bold active highlighting and directory label shifts.
- **Monochromatic Icons**: Applied theme-adaptive grayscale filters to file and folder icons in the search picker.

### Folder Parsing and Recursive Attachments
- **Search Directory support**: Configured search backend to return directories along with files, suffixing directories with a trailing slash.
- **Recursive Folder Reading**: Attaching a folder to the composer now recursively reads the actual text contents of all non-hidden files inside it, packaging them inside file tags for context.
- **Directory Skills Reading**: Skills located in folders now read all files inside the skill directory (with SKILL.md prioritized as the main prompt template) to feed more comprehensive context to the agent.

### User Message Context Visibility
- **Preserved User Message Text**: Fixed user prompt messages disappearing in the chat bubble. The composer now appends the user's query text outside of the skill XML block so it remains visible.
- **Simplified Inline Skill Chip Style**: Replaced the bordered chip box container for skills in the message bubble with a clean inline blue text style.
- **Icon Resolution**: The message bubble now dynamically renders the correct icon for skills, using the opin leaf icon for folder-based skills and sparkles for script skills.
- **Clean Session Renaming**: Updated session title derivation to strip XML blocks (skills, folders, snippets, selections), preventing raw XML tags from leaking into the sidebar. Added fallbacks to name the session after the resource if the user prompt is empty.

### Z.AI and Moonshot AI Providers
- **Provider Support**: Added full integration layers for Z.AI and Moonshot AI (Kimi) providers.
- **Model Registries**: Added flagship and everyday models, including glm-5.1, glm-5, and glm-4-flash for Z.AI, and kimi-k2.6, kimi-k2.5, and moonshot-v1-8k for Moonshot AI.
- **Base URL Routing**: Configured OpenAI-compatible client routing to call z.ai and moonshot APIs.
- **Provider Icons**: Created minimalist vector SVGs (zai.svg and moonshot.svg) with dark-mode adaptive styling.

### Settings UI and Card Aesthetics
- **Provider Dropdown List**: Updated the settings page add-provider dropdown to list all supported options, showing status indicators next to connected options.
- **Configuration Focus and Scroll**: Clicking a provider now automatically scrolls its configuration card into view, highlights it with a temporary border ring flash animation, and focuses the API key input.
- **Glassmorphic Card Panels**: Updated settings card containers across all configuration sections to use border-border/40, bg-card/45, and backdrop-blur-md for a glassmorphic aesthetic.
- **Monochromatic Buttons**: Refactored app buttons to use rounded-2xl corners, monochromatic background structures, and thin border borders.

### Subagent Icons and Spawn Cards
- **Subagent Identity Assignment**: Renamed the default agents to match their subagent identities: Opin (opin), Monkin (monkin), Rob (rob), Supricon (supricon), and Diom (diom).
- **Spawn Card Representations**: Intercepted subagent run commands inside the chat, displaying them in a styled spawn card containing their dynamic icon, custom color scheme, and a readable description instead of raw code.
- **Delegation Prompts**: Added guidelines to default agent system prompts encouraging them to delegate codebase research to subagents.

### Language Support
- **Swift Language Support**: Added a swift language mode loader using CodeMirror's legacy-modes to support Swift syntax highlighting, indent formatting, and indentation in the editor.
- **MDX Support**: Mapped the .mdx extension to the markdown language loader to provide formatting and highlighting for MDX files in the editor.
